name: ChartKit
description: A plugin-based React component that renders any chart type registered via the ChartKit settings system. Accepts a chart type and data object, delegates rendering to the appropriate plugin renderer (e.g. Yagr, D3, Highcharts), and wraps output in an error boundary with a loading fallback.
when_to_use: When rendering charts backed by a registered plugin (e.g. YagrPlugin)
As the primary chart rendering component in dashboards or analytics pages
When error boundary and loading state handling around charts is needed
avoid: When a specific chart library is needed directly without the plugin abstraction — use Yagr or Chart (charts library) directly
When no plugin has been registered for the desired chart type

props.name: id
props.description: Unique chart instance ID; auto-generated if omitted

name: SplitPane
description: A draggable split panel component that divides its two children with a moveable resizer handle. Supports vertical and horizontal split orientations, min/max size constraints, and controlled or uncontrolled size.
when_to_use: When displaying two adjacent content areas that the user should be able to resize (e.g. code + preview, chart + data table)
avoid: For static two-column layouts — use CSS flex/grid instead
When resize interaction is not needed

props.name: children
props.description: Exactly two child elements to split

props.name: allowResize
props.description: Whether user can drag to resize (default true)

props.name: minSize
props.description: Minimum size in px for the primary pane (default 50)

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum size in px for the primary pane

props.name: defaultSize
props.description: Initial size in px for the primary pane

props.name: size
props.description: Controlled size of the primary pane

props.name: primary
props.description: Which pane has the controlled size (default 'first')

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the wrapper element

props.name: paneClassName
props.description: CSS class applied to both panes

props.name: resizerClassName
props.description: CSS class for the resizer handle
